backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (onboarding modal, header, category tabs, search bar, live badge, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of two frontend files: App.tsx and SettingsPanel.tsx, describing their roles in the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the WebSearch360 React app that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing all application state (onboarding, settings, articles, tabs, search, alerts), orchestrating layout rendering, auto-refresh logic, and email alert detection for critical articles.
frontend/src/components/CategoryTabs.tsx: Horizontally scrollable tab bar component rendering category navigation tabs (ALL, Politics, War, etc.) and filtering visible tabs based on user settings.
frontend/src/components/EmailAlertBanner: Fixed-position banner component that displays dismissible email alert notifications for critical news articles sent to the user's email.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header component displaying the WebSearch360 brand logo, a live indicator, dark mode toggle button, and a settings gear icon button.
frontend/src/components/LiveBadge.tsx: Component showing a live badge, last-updated timestamp, a countdown timer to the next auto-refresh, and a manual refresh button with countdown logic.
frontend/src/components/NewsCard.tsx: React component that renders a news article card with thumbnail, category badge, severity indicators (breaking/disaster), highlighted search terms, and relative timestamps. Supports compact mode, configurable font sizes, and image toggling.
frontend/src/components/NewsTicker.tsx: React component that displays a horizontally scrolling breaking news ticker bar with a pulsing 'Breaking' label and a doubled list of headlines for seamless looping.
Modal form that collects a new user's name, email, and email delivery preference on first visit, validates inputs, and persists the data to localStorage before calling an onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Controlled search input component with a search icon and a clear (X) button that appears when the field has a value.
frontend/src/components/SettingsPanel.ts: Slide-in settings panel that lets users configure dark mode, email delivery, notification sound, refresh interval, font size, compact view, image display, and visible news categories, persisting all values to localStorage.
frontend/src/data/mockArticles.ts: Static array of mock Article objects covering multiple categories (politics, national, international, sports, war, etc.) with realistic headlines, summaries, sources, and relative timestamps for development and testing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, OKLCH CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, category colors, glassmorphism utilities, and neon glow effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/article.ts: TypeScript type definitions for Article, Category (11 values), and Severity used throughout the news feed.
frontend/src/utils/searchUtils.ts: Utility functions to filter articles by multi-term keyword query and wrap matched terms in highlight markup.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based semantic colors, neon/category color tokens, custom shadows, glassmorphism, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing WebSearch360 as a React news aggregator with its existing features, architecture notes, image requirements, and known issues.
